text.title: Cost Estimation Worked Example
text.summary: One worked example showing Cost Estimation applied end-to-end on a representative engagement.

example.title: Reference engagement
example.code: Project: acme-checkout (mid-size SaaS rebuild) WBS leaves: 24. Per leaf: O / M / P / PERT mean / rate / historical reference. Example leaf (wbs-1.1 stripe webhook handler): O=4h M=8h P=16h => PERT mean = (4 + 32 + 16) / 6 = 8.67h Rate: 120 USD/h Historical: engagement-2025-Q4 wbs-2.3 (8h actual) Sum across 24 leaves: mean=104 dev-hours ≈ 12.5k. Risks: R-01 stripe contract drift (1.2k contingency). Management reserve: 2k (10% of mean+contingency). Buyer-facing: mean=12.5k, p80 envelope=18k.
example.note: Illustrates every rule from content/01-core-rules.xml on a realistic case.
